blockers: OpenCPN day renders are missing for BOYLAT52 and BOYLAT53, so those rows remain failed despite matching S-101/semantic colour order.
summary.notes: Visual rerun only after repairs; no SVG edits and no final approvals. Candidate repair renders from owned_repair_batch10/11 were used where source-table triad paths were stale.
top_failure_themes: remaining wrong/special silhouette for installation, mooring, safe-water, and isolated-danger rows
remaining missing/incorrect pattern on BOYCON74, BOYCON81, and BOYPIL78
source/reference ambiguity for BOYCAN81 colour order
missing OpenCPN local reference renders for BOYLAT52 and BOYLAT53
